case_title: WILSON, HENRY vs. FREESE, RANDALL et al

docket_entries.description: 9:00AM, DEPT 8, CURTIS KARNOW, PRO TEM. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT IN PRO PER, DEFT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN & RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREESE, RANDALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON ST. #426, S.F, CA. 94102 $809.02 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $809.02, LEASE FORFEITED
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-29-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FREESE, RANDALL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FREESE, RANDALL
